title: Add nested section support to config parser
description: A config file parser that reads [section] key=value format needs to be extended to support nested sections via dot notation, without breaking existing behavior.

variant.spec_text: The config parser (src/config_parser.py) currently supports flat key=value pairs and single-level [section] headers. Add support for nested sections using dot notation: [parent.child] should produce {'parent': {'child': {'key': 'value'}}}. Multiple nested sections under the same parent (e.g., [database.primary] and [database.replica]) must merge correctly under the shared parent. All existing tests in tests/test_config.py must continue to pass (backward compatibility). The new nested section tests are in tests/test_nested.py.
